title: serratula heleniifolia
intro: Serratula heleniifolia, also known as Helen's milkwort or milkwort, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Europe, Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Serratula heleniifolia include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, such as acne and eczema. Serratula heleniifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
